chunks.text: Computer and IT Support Staff - EECS at Berkeley. Computer and IT Support Staff. IT Support Contacts. See separate box for Website Contacts. help@eecs.berkeley.edu - Computing services and networks in Cory, Soda, Sutardja Dai, and Jacobs Halls. inst@eecs.berkeley.edu - EECS instructional and computer lab support. esg@eecs.berkeley.edu - Electronics labs and A/V support. acg@eecs.berkeley.edu - Databases and departmental administrative staff support. IRIS information - Help and news for departmental computing infrastructure: networks, home directories, project storage, print server, personal web pages.
chunks.question: What are the main IT support email contacts for EECS?
chunks.answer: help, inst, esg, and acg email addresses.

chunks.text: Help getting new EECS accounts. New faculty hires should contact: acad-personnel@eecs.berkeley.edu. New research employees should contact their faculty sponsor. Website Support Contacts. roster@eecs.berkeley.edu - Online Directory updates (room, phone, and name changes). news@eecs.berkeley.edu - Report news about faculty, students, alumni, and staff to include on the EECS home page (awards, media features, professional milestones, etc.). eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu - Faculty home page corrections. webteam@eecs.berkeley.edu - Departmental web sites and servers.
chunks.question: Who should new EECS faculty contact for accounts?

chunks.text: EECS general computing Help Desk. Instructional and Research Information Systems (IRIS). CUSG: Computer User Support Group. IDSG: Infrastructure Development and Support Group. ISG: Instructional Support Group. Audio/Visual Support (A/V). ACG: Administrative Computing Group. To file a request for departmental A/V work, email esg@eecs.berkeley.edu.
chunks.question: What groups provide IT support at EECS?
chunks.answer: IRIS, CUSG, IDSG, ISG, and ACG.

chunks.text: Instructional Computing Support. EECS Instructional computing and computer lab support in Cory, Soda, and Sutardja Dai Halls: workstations & servers, accounts, email, and course home pages. Instructional Support Group Manager Finsen Chiu 378 Cory, +1 (510) 643-6141, finsen@eecs.berkeley.edu. Senior System Administrators Marcelino Enriquez 333 Soda, mars@eecs.berkeley.edu. Linda Huang 384 Cory, +1 (510) 643-6096, lindah@eecs.berkeley.edu. Steven Luo 386 Cory, s_luo@eecs.berkeley.edu. Offices 378, 384 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda. inst@eecs.berkeley.edu +1 (510) 643-6141, +1 (510) 642-9543.
chunks.question: Who manages the Instructional Support Group?
